metadata.description: Lehnert's personal Claude skill shop – software planning, development, Linux & sysadmin, and pentesting.

plugins.name: skill-shop-manager
plugins.description: Manages this skill shop – lists all skills, recommends the right one for any task, and creates new skills on demand.

plugins.name: sw-idea-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes software ideas for feasibility, target audience, core features, technical complexity, risks, and MVP scope – pure planning, no code generation.

plugins.name: sw-diagram-creator
plugins.description: Generates ready-to-copy Mermaid, PlantUML, and ASCII diagrams from any software description, idea, or sw-idea-analyzer output.
